subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you! It was a pleasure crossing paths at the conference, and I'd love to continue that conversation formally.

Next week works well for a 30-minute call. Could you share a couple of preferred time slots and your timezone? I'll confirm a slot that works on our end.

On the direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not in a position to share those directly. Once we've had our initial discussion and identified the right areas for senior-level technical alignment, I can coordinate introductions so your team connects with the appropriate people.

Thanks for following up, and talk soon!

Best regards
